Desktop auth

Return to the desktop app

If TableTop Nexus is installed, the auth flow should return there automatically. If it does not, open the app and retry the magic-link sign-in.

TableTop Nexus

Offline-first board, card, and party games for polished desktop play.

Published by DigiSolUK. Need help? support@tabletopnexus.app
